_comment: Passive profiling for Codex CLI (mirror of .claude/settings.json). PreToolUse records command attempts, PostToolUse records command results when the harness emits them, and SessionStart records the session. Records append to tmp/session_profiles/ for `node tools/ai.mjs status`. If hooks do not fire, ensure `[features] hooks = true` in .codex/config.toml (hooks are enabled by default in current Codex).
